---
title: "Reference"
description: "Every component and workflow across the OpenPipeline ecosystem."
toc: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: ref
    type: table
    contents:
      - "openpipeline/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_spatial/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_qc/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_rapids/**/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_composed/**/*.qmd"
    include:
      latest: "true"
    fields: [title, package, type, namespace, description]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Name"
      package: "Package"
      type: "Type"
      namespace: "Namespace"
      description: "Description"
    sort: "title"
    page-size: 100000
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="ref-facets">
  <div class="facet-bar" data-facet="package"><span class="lbl">Package</span></div>
  <div class="facet-bar" data-facet="type"><span class="lbl">Type</span></div>
  <input class="ref-search-input" type="search" placeholder="Search…  e.g. harmony, cellranger or xenium" aria-label="Search components">
</div>
```

:::{#ref}
:::

```{=html}
<span class="ref-count"></span>
<script>
function initRefListing() {
  var listing = document.getElementById("listing-ref");
  if (!listing) return;
  var tbody = listing.querySelector("tbody");
  if (!tbody) return;
  var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(tbody.querySelectorAll("tr"));

  // package name → facet colour CSS var
  var PKG_VAR = {
    openpipeline: "core", openpipeline_spatial: "spatial", openpipeline_qc: "qc",
    openpipeline_rapids: "rapids", openpipeline_composed: "composed"
  };
  // reference "type" → label shown to users
  var TYPE_LABEL = { module: "component", workflow: "workflow" };

  function cellText(row, cls) { var e = row.querySelector(cls); return e ? e.textContent.trim() : ""; }

  // 1) decorate each row: package → coloured tag, type → labelled kind
  rows.forEach(function (r) {
    var pkgEl = r.querySelector(".listing-package");
    if (pkgEl) {
      var pkg = pkgEl.textContent.trim();
      pkgEl.dataset.pkg = pkg;
      pkgEl.classList.add("ptag");
      pkgEl.innerHTML = '<span class="swatch" style="background:var(--' + (PKG_VAR[pkg] || "core") + ')"></span>' + pkg;
    }
    var typeEl = r.querySelector(".listing-type");
    if (typeEl) {
      var t = typeEl.textContent.trim();
      typeEl.dataset.type = t;
      typeEl.textContent = TYPE_LABEL[t] || t;
    }
  });

  // 2) build facet pills from the data actually present
  function makeFacet(bar, value, label, swatchVar, pressed, onToggle) {
    var b = document.createElement("button");
    b.className = "facet";
    b.setAttribute("aria-pressed", pressed ? "true" : "false");
    b.dataset.value = value;
    b.innerHTML = (swatchVar ? '<span class="swatch" style="background:var(--' + swatchVar + ')"></span>' : "") + label;
    b.addEventListener("click", function () {
      b.setAttribute("aria-pressed", b.getAttribute("aria-pressed") === "true" ? "false" : "true");
      onToggle();
    });
    bar.appendChild(b);
  }
  var pkgBar = document.querySelector('.facet-bar[data-facet="package"]');
  var typeBar = document.querySelector('.facet-bar[data-facet="type"]');
  var seenPkg = {}, seenType = {};
  rows.forEach(function (r) {
    var p = r.querySelector(".listing-package").dataset.pkg;
    if (p && !seenPkg[p]) { seenPkg[p] = 1; makeFacet(pkgBar, p, p, PKG_VAR[p] || "core", true, apply); }
    var t = r.querySelector(".listing-type").dataset.type;
    // default to workflows only, components are off until toggled on
    if (t && !seenType[t]) { seenType[t] = 1; makeFacet(typeBar, t, TYPE_LABEL[t] || t, null, t === "workflow", apply); }
  });

  var search = document.querySelector(".ref-search-input");
  var count = document.querySelector(".ref-count");

  function activeVals(bar) {
    return Array.prototype.slice.call(bar.querySelectorAll(".facet"))
      .filter(function (f) { return f.getAttribute("aria-pressed") === "true"; })
      .map(function (f) { return f.dataset.value; });
  }

  function apply() {
    var ap = activeVals(pkgBar), at = activeVals(typeBar);
    var q = (search.value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    var shown = 0;
    rows.forEach(function (r) {
      var pkg = r.querySelector(".listing-package").dataset.pkg;
      var typ = r.querySelector(".listing-type").dataset.type;
      var hay = (cellText(r, ".listing-title") + " " + cellText(r, ".listing-namespace") + " " + cellText(r, ".listing-description")).toLowerCase();
      var vis = ap.indexOf(pkg) >= 0 && at.indexOf(typ) >= 0 && (!q || hay.indexOf(q) !== -1);
      r.style.display = vis ? "" : "none";
      if (vis) shown++;
    });
    count.textContent = shown + " of " + rows.length + " shown";
  }

  search.addEventListener("input", apply);
  apply();
}
// Run AFTER Quarto's list.js has initialised the listing, so our decorations
// and default filter aren't clobbered. setTimeout(…,0) defers past list.js's
// own DOMContentLoaded handler.
if (document.readyState === "loading") {
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () { setTimeout(initRefListing, 0); });
} else {
  setTimeout(initRefListing, 0);
}
</script>
```
